{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "procdump64.exe was used to dump the memory of lsass.exe, a common technique for credential harvesting, and saved the dump file to a temporary directory.",
  "indicators": [
    "procdump",
    "lsass.exe",
    "memory dump",
    "credential dumping",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp"
  ]
}
